meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance SaaS Workflow: Mastering AI-Driven Development
content.seo_description: Bridge the 'no SaaS knowledge' gap with this expert-level workflow. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster and with higher quality.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform abstract client requirements into production-ready SaaS architectures in hours, not weeks. This workflow abstracts away deep infrastructure complexity, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic and client deliverables.
content.intro:
The screen is blank, the deadline is looming, and your client expects a robust SaaS platform while you're still wrestling with architecture patterns. Most freelancers stall because they view the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier as a wall, when in reality, it is a gateway to utilizing modern AI-native development stacks that automate the heavy lifting.

You are no longer just a coder; you are an architect of outcomes. By integrating Antigravity for structural precision and Claude Code for autonomous execution, you bypass the learning curve of legacy frameworks. This isn't just about writing code—it's about orchestrating a high-velocity delivery pipeline that keeps your clients impressed and your margins high.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the SaaS domain model and user flow. We use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate, ensuring the foundation is scalable and strictly typed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular Next.js 14 architecture with Supabase integration. Include authentication middleware, a protected route structure, and a standard repository pattern for data access.

steps.title: Database Schema Synthesis
steps.description: Translate business requirements into a relational schema. Claude Code will infer necessary relationships to avoid common data integrity pitfalls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Drizzle schema for a SaaS platform with organizations, subscriptions, and user roles. Ensure row-level security policies are included for all tables.

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Generation
steps.description: Use AI to build functional UI blocks. Focus on high-conversion landing pages and authenticated dashboards without manual CSS overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and header using Shadcn UI. Include dynamic user profile rendering and a theme toggle.

steps.title: Business Logic Automation
steps.description: Implement complex features like stripe billing or AI integrations. Claude Code handles the boilerplate logic while you conduct the logic flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a Stripe webhook handler that updates user subscription status in the database based on 'customer.subscription.updated' events.

steps.title: Regression and Quality Audit
steps.description: Ensure the codebase meets industry standards. Use Claude Code to audit for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for security vulnerabilities, specifically checking for insecure API routes and potential SQL injection points.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'prompt library' for your specific client niches to reduce scaffolding time by 40%.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep context across multiple sessions, saving you from re-explaining the project architecture.
Prioritize 'Server Actions' over standard API routes to keep your frontend and backend logic tightly coupled and type-safe.
Inject your client's brand guidelines into the Antigravity system prompt during the initial setup to automate design consistency.
Run periodic 'refactor cycles' using Claude Code to keep your dependency tree clean and avoid 'tech debt creep' during rapid iterations.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to Vercel, set up a continuous deployment pipeline, and schedule a client demo using the generated features.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with the 'no SaaS knowledge' trap and start delivering professional-grade software that scales. Our community provides the templates, prompts, and peer reviews you need to dominate the freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
